params.value: SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) AND (LastActivityDate < LAST_N_DAYS:14 OR LastActivityDate = null) ORDER BY Amount DESC LIMIT 500

CUSTOM_ACTION.path: query/?q=SELECT Id, OwnerId, Owner.Name, Amount, Name, StageName, LastActivityDate, AccountId, Account.Name, CreatedDate FROM Opportunity WHERE IsClosed = false AND RecordType.Name != 'Customer Self Service' AND CloseDate = THIS_QUARTER AND OwnerId IN ({{JS_Config.repIdInClause()}}) AND (LastActivityDate < LAST_N_DAYS:14 OR LastActivityDate = null) ORDER BY Amount DESC LIMIT 500
